zh.lifeSummary: Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan是William de Orrell和Mrs. William Orrell的兒子，出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾維根。他於1254年與Emma de Wigan在英國英格蘭藍卡爾維根結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1300年在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan是William de Orrell和Mrs. William Orrell的儿子，出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾維根。他于1254年与Emma de Wigan在英国英格兰藍卡爾維根结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1300年在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Orrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from either of two minor places in Lancashire called Orell. The placename derives from Old English ōra ‘bank, slope, hill, edge’ or ōra ‘ore’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Orrill
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire and Leicestershire): variant of   Orrell  .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
meanings: Hebrew: The Scripture name, in Hebrew, Adham, signifying 'man;' literally earthy, red earth; Rudolph, however, says the name in Ethiopic means ' to be fair, beautiful.' Hence the nurse-name Addy, little Adam.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan was born in Wigan, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the son of William de Orrell and Mrs. William Orrell. He married Emma de Wigan in 1254, in Wigan, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1300, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan est né à Wigan, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de William de Orrell et Mrs. William Orrell. Il a épousé Emma de Wigan en 1254, à Wigan, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1300, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan wurde in Wigan, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von William de Orrell und Mrs. William Orrell geboren. Er hat 1254 in Wigan, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Emma de Wigan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1300 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan è nato il nel Wigan, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di William de Orrell e Mrs. William Orrell. Lui sposato Emma de Wigan nel 1254, nel Wigan, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1300, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Orrell of Orrell and WiganはイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウィガンでWilliam de OrrellとMrs. William Orrellの息子として生まれた。1254年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウィガンでEmma de Wiganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1300年に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan(은)는 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 위건에서 William de Orrell(와)과 Mrs. William Orrell의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1254년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 위건에서 Emma de Wigan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1300년 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan nasceu em Wigan, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de William de Orrell e Mrs. William Orrell. Ele casou-se com Emma de Wigan em 1254, em Wigan, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1300, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan родился в местности виган, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали William de Orrell и Mrs. William Orrell. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma de Wigan в 1254 г. в местности виган, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1300 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Adam de Orrell of Orrell and Wigan nació en Wigan, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de William de Orrell y Mrs. William Orrell. Se casó con Emma de Wigan en 1254, en Wigan, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1300, en su pueblo.
